issue.title: Bug: 最新代码中，表单inputNumber样式宽度异常
issue.body: ### Version Vben Admin V5 ### Describe the bug? 宽度未正常拓展至表单宽度 6.8.0版本正常 ### Reproduction 宽度未正常拓展至表单宽度 6.8.0版本正常 ### System Info ```shell 1 ``` ### Relevant log output ```shell ``` ### Validations - [x] Read the [docs](https://doc.vben.pro/) - [x] Ensure the code is up to date. (Some issues have been fixed in the latest version) - [x] I have searched the [existing issues](https://github.com/vbenjs/vue-vben-admin/issues) and checked that my issue does not duplicate any existing issues. - [x] Check that this is a concrete bug. For Q&A open a [GitHub Discussion](https://github.com/vbenjs/vue-vben-admin/discussions) or join our [Discord Chat Server](https://discord.gg/8GuAdwDhj6). - [x] The provided reproduction is a [minimal reproducible example](https://stackoverflow.com/help/minimal-reproducible-example) of the bug.

comment.body: antdv-next 相同的问题/解决方案
